title: Check 4 — Catalog/SKU Applicability by Category
description: Reference data for Check 4: how to validate item descriptions and coverage by spend category (doc §4.4). Informs LLM and fallback which catalog/scope logic applies.

IT Hardware.coverage_check_logic: PR item must be on an IT-approved hardware list. Non-standard items require exception approval.

IT.coverage_check_logic: Same as IT Hardware when category_l1 is IT.

MRO.coverage_check_logic: Check against storeroom master. VMI items should be auto-replenished, not PR.

MRO / Facilities.coverage_check_logic: Check against storeroom master. VMI items should be auto-replenished, not PR.

Office Supplies.coverage_check_logic: Should match a catalog item from punch-out. Off-catalog items trigger review.

Lab Supplies.catalog_type: Approved vendor catalog, controlled items list
Lab Supplies.coverage_check_logic: Verify against approved vendor catalog. Controlled items require additional documentation.

Services.coverage_check_logic: Check role/resource type against an approved rate card, not a product catalog. Use SOW scope for 4.6.

Professional Services.coverage_check_logic: Check role/resource type against rate card; PR scope must fall within SOW scope.

category_lookup_notes: Match PR category_l1 or category_l2 against keys (case-insensitive). If no match, apply generic description semantic match and line count alignment only.
